query: (("weather forecast*" OR "meteorological forecast*" OR "heat forecast*" OR "temperature forecast*" OR "early warning system*" OR "heat warning*" OR "thermal forecast*" OR "weather prediction*" OR "climatological forecast*" OR "heat alert*" OR "heat advisory" OR "extreme heat warning*" OR "temperature alert*") AND ("cooling center*" OR "cooling centre*" OR "heat shelter*" OR "cooling shelter*" OR "air conditioning center*" OR "climate refuge*" OR "thermal refuge*" OR "cool space*" OR "emergency cooling" OR "public cooling facilit*" OR "relief center*" OR "community cooling" OR "public air conditioning") AND ("temperature mortality" OR "heat mortality" OR "thermal stress" OR "heat-related death*" OR "temperature morbidity" OR "heat illness*" OR hyperthermia OR "heat stroke" OR "excess mortality" OR "temperature-related" OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal injury")) AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "treatment effect*" OR "intervention stud*" OR "policy evaluation" OR "exogenous variation" OR "random assignment" OR "experimental design" OR counterfactual OR "program evaluation" OR "propensity score" OR "matching" OR "interrupted time series" OR "before-after" OR "controlled study")
